channel.title: samsungmobile — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by samsungmobile (samsungmobile).

item.title: CVE-2026-21024 · 6.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper privilege management in Samsung System Support Service prior to version 8.0.8.0 allows local attackers to trigger privileged functions.

item.title: CVE-2026-21022 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper handling of insufficient permissions in Routines prior to SMR May-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to access sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-21021 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper input validation in Routines prior to SMR May-2026 Release 1 allows physical attackers to launch privileged activity.

item.title: CVE-2026-21020 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper export of android application components in OmaCP prior to SMR May-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to trigger privileged functions.

item.title: CVE-2026-21019 · 8.9 HIGH
item.description: Improper input validation in FacAtFunction in Galaxy Watch prior to SMR May-2026 Release 1 allows local attacker to execute arbitrary code with system privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-21018 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Out-of-bounds write in SveService prior to SMR May-2026 Release 1 allows local privileged attackers to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2026-21016 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Incorrect privilege assignment in LocationManager prior to SMR May-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to access sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-21015 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Incorrect default permissions in FactoryCamera prior to SMR May-2026 Release 1 allows local attacker to access unique identifier.

item.title: CVE-2026-21023 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Insufficient verification of data authenticity in PackageManagerService prior to SMR Mar-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to modify the installation restriction of specific application.

item.title: CVE-2026-21010 · 6.6 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper input validation in Retail Mode prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to trigger privileged functions.

item.title: CVE-2026-21008 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Exposure of sensitive information in S Share prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows adjacent attacker to access sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-21014 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control in Samsung Camera prior to version 16.5.00.28 allows local attacker to access location data. User interaction is required for triggering this vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-21013 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Incorrect default permission in Galaxy Wearable prior to version 2.2.68.26 allows local attackers to access sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-21012 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: External control of file name in AODManager prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows privileged local attacker to create file with system privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-21011 · 5.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Incorrect privilege assignment in Bluetooth in Maintenance mode prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows physical attackers to bypass Extend Unlock.

item.title: CVE-2026-21009 · 4.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper check for exceptional conditions in Recents prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows physical attacker to bypass App Pinning.

item.title: CVE-2026-21007 · 4.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper check for exceptional conditions in Device Care prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows physical attackers to bypass Knox Guard.

item.title: CVE-2026-21006 · 4.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control in Samsung DeX prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows physical attackers to access to hidden notification contents.

item.title: CVE-2026-21003 · 5.2 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper input validation in data related to network restrictions prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows physical attackers to bypass the restrictions.

item.title: CVE-2026-21005 · 7.1 HIGH
item.description: Path traversal in Smart Switch prior to version 3.7.69.15 allows adjacent attackers to overwrite arbitrary files with Smart Switch privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-21004 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper authentication in Smart Switch prior to version 3.7.69.15 allows adjacent attackers to trigger a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2026-21002 · 5.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper verification of cryptographic signature in Galaxy Store prior to version 4.6.03.8 allows local attacker to install arbitrary application.

item.title: CVE-2026-21001 · 5.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Path traversal in Galaxy Store prior to version 4.6.03.8 allows local attacker to create file with Galaxy Store privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-21000 · 7 HIGH
item.description: Improper access control in Galaxy Store prior to version 4.6.03.8 allows local attacker to create file with Galaxy Store privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-20999 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Authentication bypass by replay in Smart Switch prior to version 3.7.69.15 allows remote attackers to trigger privileged functions.

item.title: CVE-2026-20998 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Improper authentication in Smart Switch prior to version 3.7.69.15 allows remote attackers to bypass authentication.

item.title: CVE-2026-20997 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Improper verification of cryptographic signature in Smart Switch prior to version 3.7.69.15 allows remote attackers to potentially bypass authentication.

item.title: CVE-2026-20996 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use of a broken or risky cryptographic algorithm in Smart Switch prior to version 3.7.69.15 allows remote attackers to configure a downgraded scheme for authentication.

item.title: CVE-2026-20995 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Exposure of sensitive functionality to an unauthorized actor in Smart Switch prior to version 3.7.69.15 allows remote attackers to set a specific configuration.

item.title: CVE-2026-20994 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: URL redirection in Samsung Account prior to version 15.5.01.1 allows local attackers to potentially get access token.

item.title: CVE-2026-20993 · 4.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper export of android application components in Samsung Assistant prior to version 9.3.10.7 allows local attacker to access saved information.

item.title: CVE-2026-20992 · 4.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper authorization in Settings prior to SMR Mar-2026 Release 1 allows local attacker to disable configuring the background data usage of application.

item.title: CVE-2026-20991 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper privilege management in ThemeManager prior to SMR Mar-2026 Release 1 allows local privileged attackers to reuse trial contents.

item.title: CVE-2026-20990 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: Improper export of android application components in Secure Folder prior to SMR Mar-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to launch arbitrary activity with Secure Folder privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-20989 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper verification of cryptographic signature in Font Settings prior to SMR Mar-2026 Release 1 allows physical attackers to use custom font.

item.title: CVE-2026-20988 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper verification of intent by broadcast receiver in Settings prior to SMR Mar-2026 Release 1 allows local attacker to launch arbitrary activity with Settings privilege. User interaction is required for triggering this vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-20987 · 8.7 HIGH
item.description: Improper input validation in GalaxyDiagnostics prior to version 3.5.050 allows local privileged attackers to execute privileged commands.

item.title: CVE-2026-20986 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Path traversal in Samsung Members prior to Chinese version 15.5.05.4 allows local attackers to overwrite data within Samsung Members.

item.title: CVE-2026-20985 · 7 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Improper input validation in Samsung Members prior to version 5.6.00.11 allows remote attackers to connect arbitrary URL and launch arbitrary activity with Samsung Members privilege. User interaction is required for triggering this vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-20984 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper handling of insufficient permission in Galaxy Wearable installed on non-Samsung Device prior to version 2.2.68 allows local attackers to access sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-20983 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: Improper export of android application components in Samsung Dialer prior to SMR Feb-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to launch arbitrary activity with Samsung Dialer privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-20982 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Path traversal in ShortcutService prior to SMR Feb-2026 Release 1 allows privileged local attacker to create file with system privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-20981 · 5.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper input validation in FacAtFunction prior to SMR Feb-2026 Release 1 allows privileged physical attacker to execute arbitrary command with system privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-20980 · 7 HIGH
item.description: Improper input validation in PACM prior to SMR Feb-2026 Release 1 allows physical attacker to execute arbitrary commands.

item.title: CVE-2026-20979 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: Improper privilege management in Settings prior to SMR Feb-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to launch arbitrary activity with Settings privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-20978 · 5.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper authorization in KnoxGuardManager prior to SMR Feb-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to bypass the persistence configuration of the application.

item.title: CVE-2026-20977 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control in Emergency Sharing prior to SMR Feb-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to interrupt its functioning.

item.title: CVE-2026-20976 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper input validation in Galaxy Store prior to version 4.6.02 allows local attacker to execute arbitrary script.

item.title: CVE-2026-20975 · 2.1 LOW
item.description: Improper handling of insufficient permission in Samsung Cloud prior to version 5.6.11 allows local attackers to access specific files in arbitrary path.

item.title: CVE-2026-20974 · 5.2 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper input validation in data related to network restrictions prior to SMR Jan-2026 Release 1 allows physical attackers to bypass Carrier Relock.
